text: <par>1382? (earlier tagger:1381) (earlier tagger put in division: but in light of e.g. 59815 above: not suggx+Etym.(thyr + mi) but perhaps part of ?</par>
<par>Note assimilation of medial consonants in Bahing <latinform>biŋ khu</latinform>.</par>

<par>I am interpreting the syllable <latinform>se-</latinform> as deriving from prefixal <reconstruction>*s-</reconstruction>, and <latinform>-li</latinform> as coming from the major syllable <reconstruction>*-riŋ</reconstruction>. For the same last element see the Thakali (Tukche) form <latinform>mih-li</latinform> 'life' (<latinform>mih</latinform> 'person').</par>
